data.body: FINAL: epic a88f — 10 of 12 stories fully complete + WS-F1 done + WS-F2 partial (parity gate + prompt-ref lint done; variant-overlay deferred YAGNI). WS-G (evals) not started — needs the [eval] extra (inspect_ai), which is uninstalled, so it's offline-untestable. ~32 commits. Full epic test surface (224) + core regression (242) green. Engine works end-to-end: code_review.yaml runs fetch->agent->gate->comment across lib/CLI/MCP; LangflowRunner retired.
